message:
Improve history batch write atomicity and fix pipeline executor error handling and state snapshot locking

- Restructure BatchAppend to serialize and encrypt all entries into an
  in-memory buffer before acquiring the file lock, reducing lock hold
  time and ensuring that partial serialization failures don't leave the
  lock held with an incomplete write
- Replace buffered writer with a single f.Write(buf.Bytes()) call for
  atomic append semantics
- Add ErrorActionFailFast to the pipeline executor's error action switch
  so that fail-fast steps are handled identically to fail steps instead
  of falling through to the default case
- Fix state snapshot race condition by moving stateMu.RLock() before
  the state dereference instead of after, preventing a TOCTOU window
  where the state could be modified between copy and lock acquisition

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
